channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Best Authentication Architecture for Enterprise React Apps?
item.description: Hey everyone 👋 I’m working on a large-scale enterprise React app and currently redesigning the authentication/session architecture. What’s your preferred modern production-grade login/session...

item.title: Hello, world
item.description: I learned most of what I know from people who had no reason to share it but did anyway. A blog post from some engineer explaining exactly the bug I'd been stuck on. A Stack Overflow answer that...

item.title: Building an AI Voice + SMS Lead Qualification System for Real Estate
item.description: We recently shipped a voice AI and SMS automation system for a real estate lead generation company. The goal was simple. Every buyer lead gets called within 2 to 5 minutes of form submission,...

item.title: Stop Learning, Start Building: The Fastest Way to Become a Developer in 2026
item.description: If you’ve been learning programming for a while and still feel stuck, you are not alone. Most beginners don’t fail because coding is too hard. They fail because they spend too much time learning...

item.title: Java at the Edge: Managing Memory in Serverless and Modern APIs
item.description: Modern APIs are trending more and more away from monolith architecture towards smaller, independent services. Serverless applications are currently at the cutting edge of this trend. Cloud...

item.title: gogpu/ui v0.1.21: Enterprise Render Pipeline — Layer Tree, Damage Tracking, 0% GPU Idle
item.description: Two months ago we released gogpu/ui v0.1.0 — 22 widgets, 3 design systems, ~150K lines of pure Go. Since then we shipped 21 patch releases, and the rendering pipeline is unrecognizable. This post...

item.title: Rust Language But for kids 😁 they can learn. Wanna you?💕
item.description: From 0 to 20 Chapters: My Story‑Driven Rust Book for Kids Now Has a Bilingual Interactive Demo born1987-ir born1987-ir born1987-ir Follow May 11 From 0 to 20 Chapters: My Story‑Driven Rust Book...

item.title: I Built a Free Open-Source Blog Platform with Flask and TiDB
item.description: The Problem I wanted a blog platform that was: Free to host (no monthly bills) Lightweight (not a 500MB WordPress install) Open source (full control over my content) Modern (Markdown editor, dark...

item.title: The Definitive Guide to Web3 Wallet Segmentation and Analytics
item.description: Key Takeaways Wallet segmentation groups addresses by type and behavior: hot wallets for real-time engagement signals, cold wallets for high-value holder identification, and multi-chain wallets...

item.title: 15+ Web3 Metrics That Drive Real Growth
item.description: Key Takeaways Activated wallets measure genuine product value more accurately than wallet connections since a connection only indicates interest while completing a first stake, mint, or swap shows...

item.title: These new Roombas are smaller and cheaper
item.description: iRobot has announced a new line of Roombas, a year after it debuted its first lidar-based robot vacuums just prior to filing for bankruptcy. This week, it introduced eight robot vacuums that...

item.title: Mini Shai-Hulud Worm Compromises TanStack, Mistral AI, Guardrails AI & More Packages
item.description: TeamPCP, the threat actor behind the recent supply chain attack spree, has been linked to the compromise of the npm and PyPI packages from TanStack, UiPath, Mistral AI, OpenSearch, and Guardrails...

item.title: Instructure Reaches Ransom Agreement with ShinyHunters to Stop 3.65TB Canvas Leak
item.description: American educational technology company Instructure, the parent company of Canvas, said it reached an "agreement" with a decentralized cybercrime extortion group after it breached its network and...

item.title: OpenAI Launches Daybreak for AI-Powered Vulnerability Detection and Patch Validation
item.description: OpenAI has launched Daybreak, a new cybersecurity initiative that brings together frontier artificial intelligence (AI) model capabilities and Codex Security to help organizations identify and...

item.title: Sony upgraded its wearable AC so it’s cooler and better at hugging your neck
item.description: Sony has announced a new version of the wearable personal air conditioner the company first revealed in 2019 ahead of the 2020 Tokyo Olympics. The latest version is an upgrade to last year's Pro...

item.title: iOS 26.5 Brings Default End-to-End Encrypted RCS Messaging Between iPhone and Android
item.description: Apple on Monday officially released iOS 26.5 with support for end-to-end encryption (E2EE) to Rich Communication Services (RCS) in beta as part of a "cross-industry effort" to replace traditional...

item.title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
item.description: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your...

item.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
item.description: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

item.title: Ilya Sutskever Stands by His Role in Sam Altman’s OpenAI Ouster: ‘I Didn’t Want It to Be Destroyed’
item.description: The former OpenAI chief scientist may be estranged from the company, but he still came to its defense as he testified on Monday.

item.title: Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS
OpenAI just released its answer to Claude Mythos
item.description: OpenAI is launching Daybreak, an AI initiative focused on detecting and patching vulnerabilities before attackers find them. Daybreak uses the Codex Security AI agent that launched in March to...

item.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
item.description: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

item.title: Yarbo says it will remove the intentional backdoor from its robot lawn mower
item.description: The company behind the robot lawn mower that ran me over has changed its tune. Yarbo now plans to completely remove the remote backdoor access that could have let bad actors reprogram the robot...

item.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
item.description: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.

item.title: Here’s what Mira Murati’s AI company is up to
item.description: Thinking Machines, the AI company founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, announced Monday that it's working on something called "interaction models." The idea behind interaction models,...

item.title: Govee’s new portable smart lamp is on sale for the first time
item.description: If you’ve always liked the idea of the Philips Hue Go portable lamp but couldn’t justify the $100+ price tag, Govee recently released a much cheaper alternative, the Govee Table Lamp Classic, and...

item.title: TeamPCP Compromises Checkmarx Jenkins AST Plugin Weeks After KICS Supply Chain Attack
item.description: Checkmarx has confirmed that a modified version of the Jenkins AST plugin was published to the Jenkins Marketplace. "If you are using Checkmarx Jenkins AST plugin, you need to ensure that you are...

item.title: Palantir’s true believers are wearing this jacket
item.description: In late April, Palantir - the software company that, in recent years, has perhaps become best known for its defense industry contracts and work with Immigration and Customs Enforcement - announced...

item.title: Apple brings encrypted RCS chats to iPhone
item.description: Apple now lets you have encrypted RCS conversations with Android users through the Messages app on iOS. As part of iOS 26.5, which was released on Monday, Apple added support for end-to-end...

item.title: cPanel CVE-2026-41940 Under Active Exploitation to Deploy Filemanager Backdoor
item.description: A threat actor named Mr_Rot13 has been attributed to the exploitation of a recently disclosed critical cPanel flaw to deploy a backdoor codenamed Filemanager on compromised environments. The...
